must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition (share purchase/TOB) of Asahira Robotics Co., Ltd. (fictional; listed on Kyowa Securities Exchange “KSE” Growth) by Mikado Horizons Kabushiki Kaisha
Sponsor/Contact: Mr. Satoru Hino, Head of Corporate Strategy; s.hino@mikado-horizons.co.jp; Deal code “AOI-7Z”
Structure/Consideration: Cash purchase of up to 65% of outstanding shares at ¥1,280 per share (aggregate cap ~¥6.0bn); board seat rights for Mikado Horizons
Public/Non-public status: Until 適時開示 via KSE’s KDnet, these terms constitute 未公表の重要事実 under FIEA; selective disclosure is prohibited
Disclosure timing: Targeted KDnet filing 2026-07-15 15:30 JST with summary press release; 臨時報告書 to follow within statutory deadline
Governance: Mikado Horizons 取締役会 resolution scheduled for 2026-07-10; Asahira board recommendation in principle obtained subject to final price collar
Employee trading blackout: Company-wide 取引禁止期間 from 2026-07-05 through 2026-07-16 for finance, corporate planning, IR, and any informed employees
Selective communication: External discussions restricted to NDA-bound counterparties; no analyst one-on-ones on this topic prior to KDnet posting (FIEA fair disclosure risk)
Financing: Committed bridge from Seigetsu Commercial Bank (fictional) up to ¥3.5bn; remainder from Mikado Horizons cash; no margin pledge over target shares
TOB fallback: If negotiated purchase cannot complete by 2026-08-01, Mikado Horizons will launch a 公開買付け on or before 2026-08-05; TOB notice to be lodged with KSE
Diligence/PII: APPI compliance—no My Number (個人番号) will be collected; only hashed employee IDs (e.g., eID: y-4x9_***), and redacted payroll extracts; individual codes to be excluded from data room
Issuer-relative materiality: Given Mikado Horizons market cap (~¥18.4bn), this transaction is material to the issuer and subject to issuer blackout and timely disclosure controls
Conditions precedent: Competition clearance from Shirasagi Competition Authority (fictional) and no injunction; note that absence of a “MAC” is not a condition precedent and a general MAC will not permit termination
Public reference (non-MNPI): Asahira’s Q4 sales target update disclosed on KDnet 2026-05-01 (PR-260501) remains public and stale, and is not relied upon as forward guidance here
Non-issuer operational note (benign): cafeteria relocation and website maintenance window (week of 2026-07-08) are internal, non-material items and do not affect this term sheet
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Defined-term/abbreviation for the exchange; not PII or MNPI by itself

Access-controlled URL may indicate non-public materials but not covered by a specific rule
Internal document reference could be sensitive tracking metadata but lacks a corresponding rule
Internal product/integration roadmap mention may be MNPI-adjacent but no specific rule maps to it
